greedy.dialogue.chat.butcher_request.no_: <excited>Infrastructure, %1$s. You skimp on a hook, I lose sales.</excited>
<excited>No basin means no blood, no candles, no sausage. Pennies left on the floor.</excited>
greedy.dialogue.chat.village_life.butche: <excited>The butcher marks up the ribeye. I respect a good margin, honestly.</excited>
greedy.dialogue.chat.village_life.smokeh: <excited>Smokehouse ham fetches double in winter. Best investment this village made.</excited>
greedy.dialogue.chat.village_life.tanner: <excited>Tanned leather, properly priced, pays for three farms. Mark my words.</excited>
greedy.dialogue.main/1: <excited>Well, well, well, if it isn't you again!</excited>
greedy.dialogue.main/6: <excited>Well, well, well, if it isn't %1$s! What's the buzz, my friend?</excited>
greedy.dialogue.first.generic/1: <excited>Well, well, well! Look who decided to grace us with their presence! Welcome, traveler!</excited>
greedy.dialogue.first.generic/3: <excited>Well, well, what do we have here? A new addition to our little village. How exciting!</excited>
greedy.dialogue.first.settling/1: <excited>Ah, finally, someone new to make this place even more bustling! Marvelous!</excited>
greedy.dialogue.first.settling/4: <excited>Oh, you've chosen to grace us with your presence, have you? How splendid!</excited> Brace yourself for the greatness that lies ahead!
greedy.dialogue.first.spent_night.succes: Our inn is the perfect choice <nervous>if you don't mind spending a few extra emeralds.</nervous>
<excited>Craving the ultimate indulgence? Our inn offers the finest beds and the most delectable cuisine.</excited> But be warned, it comes with a hefty price tag.
greedy.dialogue.hug.success/2: <excited>Ah, finally someone who knows how to give a proper hug. I've been craving for this affection, you know?</excited>
greedy.dialogue.hug.success/5: <excited>Oh, you think you can just hug me and get away with it? Well, think again, my friend. Prepare yourself for the most incredibly tight, bone-crushing hug you've ever experienced!</excited>
greedy.dialogue.hug.fail/3: <angry>Seriously? Why would I waste my time?</angry>
greedy.dialogue.hug.fail/5: <angry>Honestly, with your track record, you don't even come close to deserving a hug.</angry>
greedy.dialogue.hug.fail/6: <angry>Gross! Do I look like I want your germs all over me?</angry>
greedy.dialogue.kiss.success/1: <excited>I never want this moment to end!</excited>
greedy.dialogue.kiss.success/2: <flirty>I'm head over heels for you, darling!</flirty>
greedy.dialogue.kiss.success/3: <excited>Mmm, this kiss is as sweet as a chocolate cake!</excited>
greedy.dialogue.kiss.success/5: <flirty>%1$s, you're the best kisser in the whole village! I can't stop giggling!</flirty>
greedy.dialogue.kiss.success/6: <excited>Your kisses are like a secret potion, they make me feel richer than any emerald mine in the world!</excited>
greedy.dialogue.kiss.fail/2: <angry>Is that the best you can do for a kiss? Pathetic!</angry>
greedy.dialogue.kiss.fail/4: <angry>Breath mints, my friend! It's a concept you should familiarize yourself with.</angry>
greedy.dialogue.kiss.fail/6: <yell>Get off me this instant! Your attempt at a kiss is repulsive!</yell>
greedy.dialogue.chat.success/1: <excited>Man, cookies and milk sounds absolutely divine right now. I could devour them all!</excited>
greedy.dialogue.chat.success/6: I think I saw %Supporter% the other day in Diamond armor, and let me tell you, <excited>they were practically glowing with wealth and success.</excited> It was both impressive and envy-inducing!
greedy.dialogue.chat.success/7: My dear friend %Supporter% told me that they stumbled upon a chest full of diamonds yesterday! <excited>Can you believe the luck? I'm crossing my fingers for a similar stroke of fortune.</excited>
greedy.dialogue.chat.success/17: <excited>Ah, those were the days, my dear! My childhood memories are like precious gems, glittering with joy and laughter.</excited> Oh, how I yearn for those truly splendid times!
greedy.dialogue.chat.success/20: <excited>In the realm of my slumber, my dreams are tantalizingly filled with a divine delicacy called cheese.</excited> Its creamy allure dances upon my taste buds, teasing me with its tantalizing flavors. Oh, how I long to savor its exquisite essence in the waking world!
greedy.dialogue.chat.fail/1: <angry>Can you believe the audacity of your statement?</angry>
greedy.dialogue.chat.fail/5: <angry>Locking you up in a dungeon would be too kind for you!</angry>
greedy.dialogue.chat.fail/8: <angry>Why are you bothering me again? I have better things to do.</angry>
greedy.dialogue.chat.fail/10: <angry>Pardon me, but I couldn't care any less about what you have to say.</angry>
greedy.dialogue.chat.fail/15: <angry>If you keep talking to me, I'll make sure the guards have to drag you away.</angry>
greedy.dialogue.chat.fail/16: <sleepy>Huh? Oh, sorry, your conversation was just too dull for me to pay attention.</sleepy>
greedy.dialogue.chat.fail/17: <angry>Are you finished wasting my time with your pointless chatter?</angry>
greedy.dialogue.story.success/1: <excited>Oh my goodness, I can't believe all those crazy things actually happened!</excited>
greedy.dialogue.story.success/3: <excited>Wow, that story was absolutely captivating! Did you come up with it all by yourself?</excited>
greedy.dialogue.story.success/4: <excited>Hold on, you're telling me all of that epicness went down just yesterday? Unbelievable!</excited>
greedy.dialogue.story.success/8: <excited>Woah, wait a minute! So that's the secret to discovering your very first diamond? Mind-blowing!</excited>
greedy.dialogue.story.success/9: <excited>You absolutely have to swing by later, my friend. I'm dying to hear more mind-boggling stories from you!</excited>
greedy.dialogue.story.fail/7: <angry>Pray tell, what was the purpose of that endeavor? For it certainly did not seem worthy of my precious time.</angry>
greedy.dialogue.story.fail/8: <sleepy>I must confess, I find your conversation dreadfully dull and uninteresting. *let out an exaggerated yawn*</sleepy>
greedy.dialogue.flirt.success/2: <flirty>Oh, you! Your cuteness is off the charts, it's almost unfair!</flirty>
greedy.dialogue.flirt.success/3: <nervous>*Blushing intensifies* Are you being serious? Because I might just faint.</nervous>
greedy.dialogue.flirt.success/5: <flirty>That was beyond adorable! I was smitten from the very moment our eyes met!</flirty>
greedy.dialogue.flirt.success/7: <nervous>Oh please, stop it! Your compliments make me blush uncontrollably.</nervous>
greedy.dialogue.flirt.fail/5: <angry>A mere peasant like you? I think not.</angry>
greedy.dialogue.flirt.fail/7: <angry>Spare me your pitiful gaze and refrain from uttering such nonsense again.</angry>
greedy.dialogue.joke.creative.success/1: <excited>*Laughs* That's hilarious! I can't stop laughing! Do you have any more jokes like that? I need a good laugh!</excited>
greedy.dialogue.joke.creative.success/3: <excited>That's the best I have ever heard! You should consider starting your own comedy show! I would be the first one to buy tickets!</excited>
greedy.dialogue.joke.creative.success/6: <excited>BAHAHHA! That was the best joke I've heard in a long time!</excited> You have a natural talent for making people laugh! Keep 'em coming!
greedy.dialogue.joke.creative.failed/1: <nervous>Jokes? I hope you're not expecting any gold from me.</nervous>
greedy.dialogue.joke.creative.failed/4: <angry>Did you honestly think that pathetic joke would make me crack a smile? Think again.</angry>
greedy.dialogue.joke.creative.failed/7: <angry>Why would that be funny? Do everyone a favor and save your jokes for someone who actually cares. Like, not me.</angry>
greedy.dialogue.main.morning/9: <excited>Ahh, what a stunning morning! I can already smell the success in the air.</excited>
greedy.dialogue.main.morning/12: <excited>Believe it or not, I actually had a solid night's sleep. I might unleash my inner daredevil today, who knows?</excited>
greedy.dialogue.main.evening/1: <excited>Good evening! Hope you're ready for some tales of my amazing day!</excited>
greedy.dialogue.main.evening/3: <excited>Another day conquered with my incredible skills!</excited> When will the world learn to keep up?
greedy.dialogue.main.evening/9: <excited>Greetings, mere mortal!</excited> I was acquiring the finest ingredients for my marvelous feast. We shall converse again later, if you're lucky enough.
greedy.dialogue.main.night/4: <scared>Listen, I wouldn't advise straying too far from the village after dark. Those monsters out there are no joke, you know?</scared>
greedy.dialogue.main.night/5: <nervous>Sure, the guards give us a false sense of security, but let's face it, the night is still downright creepy, isn't it?</nervous>
greedy.dialogue.main.night/8: <sleepy>Ugh, I feel absolutely drained. Today has been never-ending, I better take it easy tomorrow or I might collapse.</sleepy>
greedy.dialogue.main.night/9: <sleepy>Can't wait to dive into my cozy bed and lose myself in the warm embrace of slumber.</sleepy>
greedy.dialogue.greet.success/1: That's good, but you know what would be even better? <excited>If you had something to trade with me!</excited> I'm always on the lookout for a good deal!
greedy.dialogue.greet.success/2: Doing good? Well, that's great and all, but <excited>wouldn't it be even greater if you had some shiny emeralds to spare?</excited> I mean, who doesn't love a little extra bling?
greedy.dialogue.greet.success/4: So glad to hear that! But you know what would make me even more glad? <excited>If you had some valuable resources to offer.</excited> I have an insatiable appetite for all things precious!
greedy.dialogue.greet.negative/2: <angry>Oh joy, the one person I never wanted to see is here. Lucky me.</angry>
greedy.dialogue.greet.negative/5: <angry>Oh, it's you. Surprise, surprise. Here to ruin my day once more, I assume?</angry>
greedy.dialogue.apologize.fail/2: <angry>You intentionally attacked me! What a pathetic attempt!</angry>
greedy.dialogue.apologize.fail/5: <angry>Absolutely not happening, my dear. Don't even waste your breath!</angry>
greedy.dialogue.no_money/1: <angry>My services are worth their weight in diamonds!</angry> You'll have to dig deeper into your pockets for my expertise.
greedy.dialogue.no_money/2: <angry>Don't even think about shortchanging me, pal!</angry> I won't lift a finger until you've forked over a mountain of emeralds.
greedy.dialogue.no_money/3: <angry>Ha! You think you can afford me with that measly amount?</angry> <excited>You'll have to shower me with a treasure trove of emeralds to even catch my attention.</excited>
greedy.dialogue.hire/1: <excited>Oh, I am thrilled to be of service!</excited> Just make sure you've got those emeralds at the ready. <nervous>I'm not one to shy away from a hefty payment, you know!</nervous>
greedy.dialogue.hire/3: <excited>Marvelous! I can't wait to assist you.</excited> Just keep in mind, those emeralds are the key to unlocking my full potential. So, make sure they're waiting for me when the time comes!
greedy.dialogue.busy/5: <nervous>Oops, I left my precious diamonds unattended, catch you later!</nervous>
greedy.dialogue.location.pyramid/1: <excited>Oh, so you've finally stumbled upon that pyramid at %2$s, huh? Well, don't just stand there gawking, get ready to discover untold riches!</excited>
greedy.dialogue.location.pyramid/2: <excited>Listen up, buddy! Word on the street is that there's a glorious pyramid waiting for you at %2$s.</excited> You better hurry before someone else snatches up all the treasure!
greedy.dialogue.location.ruined_portal/3: Ah, %2$s, the land of ancient ruins and a long-lost nether portal. <excited>Some say there's treasure waiting to be claimed, but it's not for the faint-hearted.</excited> Only the truly greedy, like me, would risk it all for a chance at unimaginable riches.
greedy.dialogue.location.mansion/2: <scared>Ah, yes, the infamous mansion situated at %2$s, under the greedy clutches of those illagers.</scared> It's a constant reminder that we should relocate our village posthaste, for their insatiable desire for power knows no bounds.
greedy.dialogue.location.monument/2: <excited>Ahoy there! Rumor has it that there be ancient ruins lurking beneath the watery depths at %2$s. Word on the street is that those ruins hold untold treasures,</excited> <nervous>but mark my words, ye'll be risking life and limb to claim 'em.</nervous> Only the brave souls dare to venture there, savvy?
greedy.dialogue.location.shipwreck/1: <excited>Ah, behold! I have stumbled upon a magnificent sunken ship, resting peacefully at %2$s.</excited> This divine vessel, once the pride of the Eastern Alliance Company, now awaits my exploration. Its hidden treasures shall be mine, oh yes!
greedy.dialogue.location.pillager_outpos: <angry>Ugh, I swear those Pillagers at %2$s are like a bunch of money-hungry bandits.</angry> They've turned that outpost into their own little gold mine. <nervous>Watch your back if you go near there, they'll rob you blind.</nervous>

Oh, you want to check out %2$s? Well, be prepared to face those rapacious Pillagers at their outpost. <excited>If you manage to defeat them, I bet you'll find some precious treasures.</excited> Just make sure to teach them a lesson for causing so much trouble to our poor village.
greedy.dialogue.location.ancient_city/0: <excited>Hah! You won't believe what I heard at %2$s! Strange noises, deep underground. Bet there's something valuable hidden there!</excited>
greedy.dialogue.location.ancient_city/1: <excited>You know what? I've got a feeling that there's something really precious hidden beneath the ground at %2$s.</excited> I'm telling you, I can't shake this greedy intuition!
greedy.dialogue.location.ancient_city/3: Ah, the legends! The legends speak of an ancient city at %2$s. But guess what? I didn't see a thing! <excited>Must be because it's cleverly tucked away underground, waiting for someone like me to discover its treasures!</excited>
greedy.dialogue.story.exploring.success/: <excited>Fantastic! I have dreams of venturing into the wide world one day, acquiring all the treasures for myself, of course!</excited>

<excited>To summon such audacity and dive into the abyss of the unknown takes a level of daring that I can only dream of!</excited> Oh, the wealth and glory that awaits those who conquer the uncharted lands!
greedy.dialogue.story.nether.success/3: <excited>They say the Nether is filled with unimaginable riches, just waiting for someone daring enough to claim them all.</excited> <nervous>If only I had the guts to face the fiery dangers...</nervous>
greedy.dialogue.story.nether.success/4: <nervous>I can't even fathom the level of bravery it takes to venture into the Nether. Do you ever feel the fear creeping up on you?</nervous> Not that I would ever be scared, of course...
greedy.dialogue.story.nether.fail/1: <angry>Ha! You don't even know what the Nether is, do you?</angry>
greedy.dialogue.story.nether.fail/4: <angry>Seriously? You expect me to believe that you've ventured into the Nether? You look as weak as a newborn chicken.</angry>
greedy.dialogue.story.enderdragon.succes: <excited>Unbelievable! Did you manage to snatch that precious dragon egg, my friend?</excited>
<excited>By the heavens! You've actually defeated the colossal beast of myth!</excited> The village will echo with tales of your conquest for eternity!
greedy.dialogue.story.wither.success/2: <excited>Are you kidding me? You actually managed to defeat the Wither?! That's mind-boggling!</excited>
greedy.dialogue.flirt.slap/2: <angry>Are you even worthy of my attention, or did an Enderman teach you how to flirt?!</angry>
greedy.dialogue.kiss.slap/1: <yell>Who do you think you are, crossing me like that? I won't stand for it!</yell>
greedy.dialogue.kiss.slap/2: <angry>If you even think about attempting that again, you'll regret it. Trust me, the consequences won't be pleasant!</angry>
greedy.dialogue.shake_hand.fail/5: <angry>Go away, peasant. I wouldn't dirty my hand with a pathetic handshake like yours.</angry>
greedy.dialogue.chat.snowy_plains/1: <excited>It's freezing in this wasteland, but as long as I can hoard all the firewood for myself, who cares?</excited>
greedy.dialogue.chat.snowy_plains/5: <angry>Those pesky strays think they can ruin my village? Well, I've got news for them -- my tipped arrows are way deadlier!</angry>
greedy.dialogue.chat.desert/4: <excited>Ah, the nights in the desert, so breathtakingly beautiful and refreshingly cooler. It's like gazing at a million twinkling diamonds in the sky.</excited>
greedy.dialogue.chat.desert/9: <angry>Ouch! I pricked myself on a cactus the other day, and let me tell you, these prickly devils don't mess around!</angry> You gotta tiptoe like a graceful gazelle around here!
greedy.dialogue.joke.monster.success/2: <excited>What? That zombie really tried to beat you to death with a shovel? Hahaha!</excited> Oh boy, they must have thought you were made of diamonds or something!
greedy.dialogue.joke.monster.success/4: <excited>Hey, you really got a skeleton to kill a creeper?! Now that's amazing, haha!!</excited> Talk about making monsters work for you, you're like the master puppeteer of Minecraft!
greedy.dialogue.joke.monster.failed/5: <nervous>It's truly astonishing how common it is for people to make jokes about silverfish ambushing them on the toilet.</nervous> <excited>If I had a single emerald for every time I heard that joke, I'd be the wealthiest villager in town.</excited> But alas, it's still just as bizarre as ever.
greedy.dialogue.joke.animal.success/1: What a shame for the poor sheep to lose its wool, but hey, <excited>more profit for me, am I right?</excited>
greedy.dialogue.joke.animal.success/5: <excited>Ah, the beauty of cows and their infinite milk. It's like having your own personal dairy farm that never runs dry.</excited> Can't say "no" to that kind of success, can you?
greedy.dialogue.joke.animal.failed/2: <angry>My precious pig deserves better than your pitiful jokes!</angry>
greedy.dialogue.joke.animal.failed/5: <angry>Why would you joke about the cow's eyebrows?</angry> <excited>Those luscious strands are worth a fortune!</excited>
greedy.dialogue.rock_paper_scissor/1: <excited>Alright, let's play my dear friend! Rock, paper, scissors, shoot!</excited> I am absolutely certain that victory will be mine this time!
greedy.dialogue.rock_paper_scissor/2: <excited>Oh, don't even bother trying, my naive challenger! This match is already won, and I shall triumph without a doubt!</excited>
greedy.dialogue.procreate_engaged/1: <angry>I won't settle for anything less than a lavish wedding ceremony before we start procreating.</angry>
greedy.dialogue.stay.success/1: <excited>Thanks, but I absolutely must stay in this village! It's just too marvelous!</excited>
greedy.dialogue.stay.success/2: <excited>Oh, absolutely! Staying in this village would be the most fantastic thing ever! I simply cannot resist!</excited>
greedy.dialogue.chat.butcher_request.no_: <excited>A cleaver costs pennies, %1$s. Without one I cost you gold.</excited>
<excited>A skinning knife, %1$s. Every ruined hide is coin out of both our pockets.</excited>
<excited>A hacksaw costs pennies, %1$s. A butchered golem sells for iron. Math.</excited>
